summary: Iteration 58 - All tests passed. Verified: 1) Search box for caselaw uses per-ground state (searchOpen object) so ALL grounds can have search boxes open independently, 2) Delete ground button uses variant='destructive' with bg-red-600 styling for mobile visibility, 3) AlertDialog used for delete confirmations (not window.confirm), 4) Backend DELETE APIs work with cookie auth, 5) AI endpoints (progress-analysis, auto-identify, investigate) exist and respond correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GroundsOfMerit.jsx line 77: searchOpen = useState({}) - object-based state ensures per-ground independence
GroundsOfMerit.jsx line 80-81: toggleSearch updates searchOpen[groundId] individually
GroundsOfMerit.jsx line 323: searchOpen[ground.ground_id] && ... - each ground has independent search box visibility
GroundsOfMerit.jsx line 311: delete button uses variant='destructive'
GroundsOfMerit.jsx line 314: delete button has className='bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white'
CaseDetail.jsx line 1442: AlertDialog for delete ground confirmation (not window.confirm)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

success_rate.frontend: Code review verification passed - all requirements met

seed_data_creation: Test cases created and cleaned up during pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Key feature verified: GroundsOfMerit search box state is now an object {} not a single ID, meaning clicking 'Search' on multiple grounds opens search boxes for ALL of them independently. Backend APIs tested: DELETE /api/cases/{id}, DELETE /api/cases/{id}/reports/{id}, POST /api/cases/{id}/progress-analysis, POST /api/cases/{id}/grounds/auto-identify, POST /api/cases/{id}/grounds/{id}/investigate - all working.

per_ground_search_state.requirement: Search box should appear for EVERY ground when clicked, not just the first ground
per_ground_search_state.implementation: searchOpen = useState({}) object with toggleSearch updating searchOpen[groundId]

delete_button_mobile_visibility.requirement: Delete buttons must work on mobile

alert_dialog_for_deletes.requirement: All delete operations use AlertDialog (NOT window.confirm)
